summary: Sprint 6 (Final Polish) frontend testing complete. All 23 test cases PASS. Desktop (1440x800) and mobile (390x844) verified. All pastel chip colors, notebook ruled lines, Lora font/lineHeight, terminal shadow/border, footer, LinkedIn link, signoz 5-entry tree, whoami/status card accents, clear command, global auto-focus all confirmed working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 6 fully passing. All pastel chip colors correct: whoami=#E6E4FF, log=#FFF9E0, status=#FFE4E9 with dark text #333333. Transition 0.5s verified. Notebook ruled lines on right pane and mobile drawer verified via getComputedStyle backgroundImage. Lora font + 26px lineHeight confirmed on right pane body text and tree entries. Terminal border=1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05), boxShadow=0 40px 100px rgba(0,0,0,0.07). Footer: 'Product Marketing Manager | SigNoz [v1.8]' + LinkedIn link data-testid=footer-linkedin-link. signoz/ has 5 entries: mascot/gtm/growth/hiring/ops with correct content (no em dashes). whoami borderColor=#E6E4FF accentColor=#6B68C8 for Structural GTM header. status borderColor=#FFE4E9. clear command resets history and right pane. Global auto-focus (click anywhere = terminal input focused) working. Mobile drawer opens/closes correctly.
